Title: Self-service privilege escalation on PUT /users/me
WhyItMatters: Authenticated user can update role/isVerified/status via shared update DTO, enabling privilege abuse
SuggestedChange: Create a restricted self-update schema (exclude role,isVerified,status) and use it in updateCurrentUser

Title: Inactive-account auto-activation path is unreachable
WhyItMatters: Login throws for inactive users before reactivation code, causing contradictory behavior and maintenance confusion
SuggestedChange: Choose one policy: block inactive and remove reactivation code, or allow reactivation before token issuance

Title: ESLint pipeline incompatible with ESLint v9
WhyItMatters: Lint gate fails, lowering release confidence and CI readiness
SuggestedChange: Add eslint.config.js flat config or align ESLint version/config

Title: Jest test discovery includes non-test files
WhyItMatters: Test suite fails due to files with no tests; quality gate stays red
SuggestedChange: Adjust jest testMatch/testPathIgnorePatterns and move setup file to setupFilesAfterEnv

Title: Prisma query typed with as any in user search
WhyItMatters: Type safety bypass can hide schema/client mismatch and runtime defects
SuggestedChange: Regenerate Prisma client and remove any-cast query fallback
